chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-132 of 2016 Const. Petition No.D-3794 of 2014 Const. Petition No.D-3729 of 2015 Const. Petition No.D-2671 of 2016 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 02-11-2023 Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioners, no intimation received. These petitions are pending since 2014, 2015, and 2016 without any interest taken by the petitioners to pursue the same. On the last date of hearing a last and final chance was given but today no one is present. Accordingly, these petitions are dismissed in non-prosecution. Office is directed to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matters. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
